MVA · IGM System Briefing
Complete Reasoning & Narrative
LA County Military & Veterans Affairs · AI Governance Module
What Is This App?
This is the MVA Veteran Services Portal — a field tool for LA County Military & Veterans Affairs staff that logs every AI-assisted interaction with a veteran, governs how AI is used, and converts that governance into measurable impact data for the Board of Supervisors, JCOD, and grant funders.
Built on the Inference Governance Module (IGM) — Patent Pending USPTO 19/571,156 · DeBacco Nexus LLC. IGM sits between the staff member and the AI model, enforcing responsible output and recording every interaction for accountability, reporting, and environmental stewardship.
The Four Active Rooms
Room 1 · VTC Intake Form
Digital enrollment for Veterans Treatment Court participants. Replaces paper intake, enables instant VetPro data transfer, and creates a timestamped record at first contact.
Room 2 · JIV Audit Log
Justice-Involved Veteran tracking. Every AI-assisted case note, court prep, referral, or discharge upgrade logged here generates a governed token record. The Audit Log feeds directly into the JCOD and Board report.
Room 3 · VSR Services Log
All veterans — JIV and non-JIV. Walk-ins, phone consults, crisis response, housing, VA claims. The combined IGM savings bar here reflects both rooms together, giving a unified picture of total AI governance impact.
Room 4 · Digital Business Card
Shareable contact with QR codes, VA accreditation credentials, and direct links to the MVA portal. Designed for court appearances, partner meetings, and veteran hand-offs.
🫀 Veteran Wellness Seconds — The Core Metric
Formula: Time Saved (minutes) × 60 = Wellness Seconds returned to direct veteran care.
When a VSO uses AI to draft a case note in 3 minutes instead of 15, 12 minutes × 60 = 720 Wellness Seconds are freed. Those seconds go back to the veteran — a conversation, an assessment, a crisis de-escalation. This is a social work metric for a social work system. Time is the only resource that cannot be replenished.
Why It Matters to Funders
Grant bodies and the Board of Supervisors can visualize staff capacity being returned to veterans — not as an abstraction, but as a counted, timestamped, auditable number. Every logged interaction is a documented return of human attention to veteran welfare.
⚙ Token Calculations — How IGM Governs
AI models process language in tokens — roughly 0.75 words each. An ungoverned AI interaction might consume 450–500 tokens generating a verbose, unstructured response. The IGM constrains the output to ~150 governed tokens — precise, structured, and actionable for VSO use.
Tokens In (ungoverned baseline)~300–450 per interaction
Tokens Out (governed output)~150 per interaction
IGM Rate (average reduction)64–71% per type
Time saved per interaction~12 min auto-calculated
Token benchmarks are set per interaction type — VA Claims interactions save more tokens than a brief phone consult because they involve more complex AI reasoning that benefits most from governance constraints.
🌱 Environmental Savings — Proxy Methodology
Each token saved from ungoverned AI use avoids real infrastructure consumption. These are proxy estimates derived from peer-reviewed AI sustainability literature:
Energy per token saved~0.30 mWh
Water per token saved~0.50 mL
CO₂ per token saved~0.15 mg
Sources: Patterson et al. (2021) Carbon Footprint of Machine Learning; Strubell et al. (2019) Energy and Policy Considerations for Deep Learning in NLP; Li et al. (2023) Making AI Less Thirsty. Token-level granularity is a proxy — actual values vary by data center, region, and model architecture.
💵 Dollar Savings — VSO Labor Value
Each saved token reduces compute cost. Multiplied by VSO hourly labor value, this converts AI efficiency into staff capacity dollars returned to the department.
Tokens Saved × $0.000003/token × $500 VSO hourly equivalent = Dollar Value Returned
This is a conservative proxy. The $500/hr VSO equivalent reflects total loaded cost including benefits, overhead, and institutional value of a trained, accredited Veterans Services Officer. Actual ROI to the county is likely higher when veteran outcomes are factored in.
📋 Board of Supervisors & Grant Funders Report
The dark report card in each room is designed specifically for two audiences: the LA County Board of Supervisors and grant funders reviewing MVA program outcomes. It surfaces the four metrics those audiences care most about:
🟣
Veteran Wellness Seconds — Human time returned to direct veteran care. The primary social work impact metric.
🟡
Dollars Saved — Staff labor value recovered through AI efficiency. Justifies program investment.
🟢
CO₂ Reduced — Environmental stewardship. LA County sustainability commitments met through governed AI.
🔵
Governed AI Rate — Accountability percentage. Demonstrates responsible AI deployment to oversight bodies.
🔒 Offline Mode · PIN Security · PWA
The app works without internet. Logs save locally and sync automatically when connectivity returns. Each staff member sets a personal 4-digit PIN after first login — the team access code is never stored. The app installs as a Progressive Web App on any device — iPhone, Android, desktop — with no app store required. The MVA patch icon appears on the home screen like a native app.
⚖ Legal · IP · Disclaimer
The Inference Governance Module (IGM) is proprietary technology of DeBacco Nexus LLC. Patent Pending: USPTO Application 19/571,156. All savings figures are proxy estimates suitable for program narrative and trend reporting. They should not be presented as precisely verified measurements without independent audit. Actual environmental savings depend on data center infrastructure, region, energy mix, and model architecture. This system is deployed under license agreement with LA County Department of Military and Veterans Affairs.
